prompt: How to stop an HTTP server gracefully?
actual: The session is ending. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!
model_raw:

The session is ending. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!
expected:
Put `Stop the <http-server>` in an Application-End handler.

```aro
(Application-End: Success) {
    Stop the <http-server> with <application>.
    Return an <OK: status> for the <shutdown>.
}
```
